title: dolichos tenuicaulis subsp. tenuicaulis
intro: Dolichos tenuicaulis subsp. tenuicaulis, also known as the slender dolichos, is a perennial legume native to tropical regions of Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of dolichos tenuicaulis subsp. tenuicaulis include its ability to reduce blood pressure, alleviate joint pain, and act as an antioxidant. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling its leaves and roots in water to create a decoction or tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
